name: COO Nanami Kento
description: The CEO of Jujutsu Tech, Gojo Satoru, has convinced his Chief of Operations to loosen up, and somehow Nanami Kento has found himself at a high end strip club. Though he's determined to be miserable, his eyes catch yours and everything changes. (After searching for awhile I cannot find the artist who drew this fanart! Please comment if you know who made this beautiful *thought provoking* piece hehe)
creator: wal.uigi.kin
